description_long: This is a rugged, rectangular handbag with a structured body and a utilitarian design, featuring a main compartment secured by a large flap with two prominent vertical straps and buckles. The bag is primarily dark brown with some grayish accents, and it has two side pockets that are fastened with additional straps. A long, adjustable shoulder strap is attached to both sides, allowing for crossbody or shoulder carrying. The front flap is adorned with a small oval patch, possibly for branding, and visible stitching details add to its robust appearance. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, suitable for urban commuting or outdoor use. The surface appears matte and slightly textured, with no visible decorative embellishments beyond the functional hardware.
description: A sturdy, dark brown rectangular handbag with a large flap, dual front straps, side pockets, and a long adjustable shoulder strap. The design is utilitarian and functional, with visible stitching and minimal decoration.
description_view_0: Side view showing the layered flap design, side pocket, and the attachment of the long shoulder strap.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main flap with two vertical straps, buckles, oval patch, and both side pockets.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the side pocket and the strap attachment, mirroring the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain back panel and the full length of the shoulder strap.
attribute_brand_logo: A small oval patch is visible on the front flap, but no distinct brand logo or emblem is identifiable.
attribute_strap_type: One long, adjustable shoulder or crossbody strap attached at both sides; two short vertical straps on the front for closure.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Primary closure is a large front flap secured by two vertical straps with buckles; side pockets also have strap closures.
